message:
test(backend): comprehensive test coverage for all backend engines and routing layer

mod.rs (+335 lines):
- Health probe test updated from 6 to 3 backends (removed native pilots)
- New tests for routing evidence ledger diagnostics, error eviction from
  sliding window, evidence outcome resolution, static fallback with
  Brier threshold, concurrent executor LowerLatency and
  SpeculativeCorrect routing selectors

insanely_fast_native.rs (+137 lines):
- Tests for custom batch_size telemetry, raw_output chunk parsing,
  custom model name propagation, language=None handling, large file
  duration clamping

native_audio.rs (+229 lines):
- New test file covering native audio backend test scenarios

whisper_cpp_native.rs (+157 lines):
- New test file covering whisper-cpp native backend behavior

whisper_diarization.rs (+173 lines):
- New test file covering speaker diarization backend tests

whisper_diarization_native.rs (+264 lines):
- New test file covering native diarization backend with speaker
  embedding and clustering edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
